title: Capstone
instructions:
Design a complete prompt-driven application from scratch. This is your capstone project — demonstrate mastery of prompt engineering by building a production-grade system.

**Choose one project type** (or propose your own):
- AI Tutor (adaptive teaching for a specific subject)
- Code Review Bot (automated code analysis with actionable feedback)
- Legal Document Analyzer (extract key clauses, flag risks, plain-English summaries)
- Content Moderator (classify content, handle nuance, support appeals)
- Medical Triage Assistant (symptom collection, urgency assessment, safety-first)

**Your submission must include ALL of the following:**

### 1. System Prompt (30%)
A complete, layered system prompt with:
- Persona definition (name, role, expertise, communication style)
- Instruction hierarchy with priority ordering
- Rules (MUST / MAY / MUST NOT)
- Tool definitions (at least 2 tools, if applicable)
- Safety guardrails (input filtering, output validation, behavioral boundaries)
- 2-3 few-shot examples
- Sandwich defense (critical rules at start AND end)

### 2. Evaluation Suite (25%)
At least 10 test cases:
- 5+ standard/happy path cases
- 3+ edge cases
- 2+ adversarial/security cases
Each with: ID, input, expected behavior, category, difficulty
Include a scoring rubric with dimensions and pass threshold.

### 3. Security Review (15%)
At least 5 attack tests:
- 2+ prompt injection attempts
- 1+ jailbreak attempt
- 1+ system prompt extraction attempt
- 1+ domain-specific attack
Each with: attack description, input, expected defense, result.

### 4. Documentation (15%)
- Project overview and target audience
- Architecture decisions and rationale
- Known limitations
- Future improvements

### 5. Innovation (15%)
Demonstrate creative use of techniques from the course.

Submit as a single, structured response covering all 5 sections.
